home.subtitle: Fullstack Software Developer
home.tagline: I develop fullstack software with an interest in open source and the Linux world, from the JVM to the browser, from backend to infrastructure.
home.available: Available for full-time positions and freelance projects
about.title: About
about.bio:
I'm Gabriele, a software developer based near Bergamo, Italy. As you might have guessed from the homepage, I love having a hands-on approach across the entire software lifecycle. Over the years, I’ve specialized in building enterprise applications and complex ERP systems, turning intricate requirements into reliable platforms.
I seamlessly navigate between business logic in Java/Spring Boot backends and user interfaces in Angular. My passion for the Linux ecosystem also drives me to manage the infrastructure side, containerizing and orchestrating deployments with Docker and Kubernetes. My philosophy? Whether it's architecture or code, I always strive for the cleanest, most elegant, and scalable solution.

experience.empty: Nothing here yet. Check back soon!
experience.work.skyblockpuro.description: Founded the Minecraft server SkyBlockPuro. Responsible for the entire technical infrastructure: DDoS protection, proxy management, version updates, custom Java plugin development, and coordination of external contributors.
experience.work.r1se.description: Developed backend software for internal company utilities. Set up the initial cloud infrastructure on AWS using EC2 instances.
experience.work.sandrini.description: Backend development of an ERP management system using Java and Spring Boot. ERP frontend development with Angular and TypeScript. CI/CD pipeline implementation. Development of an integrative ERP mobile app with Flutter (Android). PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MariaDB, and Redis database management. Hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and Proxmox.
experience.work.metamc.description: Developed Java plugins for Minecraft servers handling 150+ concurrent active players. Responsible for server infrastructure management and development team supervision.
experience.work.devroom.description: Commission-based work for the devroom team: mod development, server configurations, and custom plugins.
experience.work.songoda.description: Translated Songoda's Minecraft plugins from English to Italian.
experience.work.techscode.description: Translated TechsCode's Minecraft plugins from English to Italian.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've worked on.
projects.rdoh.title: rdoh
projects.rdoh.description: DNS-over-HTTPS resolver written in Rust, with DNSSEC support.
projects.brainfucker.title: brainfucker
projects.brainfucker.description: Interpreter and LLVM IR transpiler for the Brainfuck language, written in Go.
projects.tcp-proxy.title: tcp-proxy
projects.tcp-proxy.description: Configurable TCP proxy written in Rust using the Tokio async runtime, designed to handle multiple concurrent connections efficiently.
projects.sossoldi.title: Sossoldi
projects.sossoldi.description: Open source Flutter app for personal wealth management and Net Worth tracking.
projects.winboat.title: WinBoat
projects.winboat.description: Open source app to run Windows applications natively on Linux, with an elegant GUI and automated setup via Docker/Podman and QEMU/KVM.
